title: A Short Hymn To Venus.
content:
Goddess, I do love a girl,
    Ruby-lipp'd and tooth'd with pearl;
    If so be I may but prove
    Lucky in this maid I love,
    I will promise there shall be
    Myrtles offer'd up to thee.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "A Short Hymn To Venus."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
